title: SQL Server Deadlock Analysis
description: Investigate deadlock cycles using Extended Events — identifies victim/survivor chains, conflicting access patterns, and structural fixes
author: J. Smith

xe_deadlock_summary.description: Deadlock event summary from Extended Events ring buffer

interactive_hints.xe_deadlock_detail: Run to see the full deadlock chain — victim process, survivor process, the exact resources they were competing for, and the SQL text of each
interactive_hints.deadlock_index_analysis: Run to check whether missing indexes on the deadlocked tables are forcing lock escalation
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

xe_deadlock_detail.description: Full deadlock chain — victim/survivor, resources, SQL text

interactive_hints.deadlock_index_analysis: Run to check if missing or incomplete indexes are forcing the deadlock — often a covering index eliminates the cycle entirely
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if the chain analysis is sufficient for your diagnosis

deadlock_index_analysis.description: Index coverage analysis on deadlocked tables

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with remediation recommendations
